notes: Polished snake implementation with smooth interpolation, demo AI, countdown, bonus food, level progression, audio, and high score persistence — minor quirk in tail-fade alpha logic and L-turn head snap correction is imperfect but overall excellent.
Excellent implementation with input queueing, smooth head interpolation, and great visual polish, though the tail doesn't interpolate smoothly.

A polished and fully playable Snake build with good presentation and controls, but not flawless due to minor state/input quirks, possible bonus spawn edge cases, and nonessential complexity that could hide rare issues.
